== Advisor Zhuge вҷӮ ==
Internet celebrity from the Three Kingdoms. Good at hyping, always on the decline!

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Advisor Zhuge, upgrade [[Cathay]] general Adviser Zhuge to max (T9).

=== вҳҶвҳҶвҳҶ > вҳ…вҳ…вҳ… ===
After 7 letters back and forth, Advisor Zhuge will gift [[Maze Diagrams|<span style="color:#40da25;">Maze Diagrams</span>]] and move in permanently with his minion, Wood Golem. 

== Rent ==
[[File:Advisor Zhuge rent.png|frameless|left]]
Advisor Zhuge rent is collected on '''Monday''' and found on the scroll on the back wall. Only one of the potential items will be found.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe|orange}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb|orange}}

{{Clear}}

== Relics ==
Upgrading these will earn Lottery Tickets!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|вҳ…
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|вҳ…вҳ…
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…
|Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…
|Lottery Ticket +3
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Rubik's Cube}}{{Relink|Rubik's Cube}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Ancient Block}}{{Relink|Ancient Block}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Truth Crystal}}{{Relink|Truth Crystal}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Cavendish's Scale}}{{Relink|Cavendish's Scale}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Cuneiform Tablet}}{{Relink|Cuneiform Tablet}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|The Analects}}{{Relink|The Analects}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Causality}}{{Relink|Causality}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Hammurabi Code}}{{Relink|Hammurabi Code}}
|}

== Advisor Zhuge's Maze ==
With his exploits, history is crowned; For his Maze, he's renowned. The river flows but stones still stand, though he'd not taken back lost land.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||CIV +5||Lumber Camp Output +1%
|-
|2||180||2k||CIV +10||Lumber Camp Output +2%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||CIV +15||Lumber Camp Output +3%
|-
|4||200||8k||CIV +20||Lumber Camp Output +4%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||CIV +25||Lumber Camp Output +5%
|-
|6||220||18k||CIV +30||Lumber Camp Output +6%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||CIV +35||Lumber Camp Output +7%
|-
|8||240||32k||CIV +40||Lumber Camp Output +8%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||CIV +45||Lumber Camp Output +9%
|-
|10||260||50k||CIV +50||Lumber Camp Output +10%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||CIV +55||Lumber Camp Output +11%
|-
|12||285||72k||CIV +60||Lumber Camp Output +12%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||CIV +65||Lumber Camp Output +13%
|-
|14||315||98k||CIV +70||Lumber Camp Output +14%
|-
|15||330||112k||CIV +75||Lumber Camp Output +15%
|-
|16||345||123k||CIV +80||Lumber Camp Output +16%
|-
|17||360||144k||CIV +85||Lumber Camp Output +17%
|-
|18||375||162k||CIV +90||Lumber Camp Output +18%
|-
|19||390||180k||CIV +95||Lumber Camp Output +19%
|-
|20||400||200k||CIV +100||Lumber Camp Output +20%
|-
|21||420||220k||CIV +105||Lumber Camp Output +21%
|-
|22||440||242k||CIV +110||Lumber Camp Output +22%
|-
|23||460||264k||CIV +115||Lumber Camp Output +23%
|-
|24||480||285k||CIV +120||Lumber Camp Output +24%
|-
|25||500||309k||CIV +125||Lumber Camp Output +25%
|-
|26||520||333k||CIV +130||Lumber Camp Output +26%
|-
|27||540||357k||CIV +135||Lumber Camp Output +27%
|-
|28||560||381k||CIV +140||Lumber Camp Output +28%
|-
|29||580||405k||CIV +145||Lumber Camp Output +29%
|-
|30||600||429k||CIV +150||Lumber Camp Output +30%
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Advisor Zhuge's Maze is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +10
|-
|2||4k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +20
|-
|3||6k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +30
|-
|4||8k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +40
|-
|5||10k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +50
|-
|6||12k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +60
|-
|7||14k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +70
|-
|8||16k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +80
|-
|9||18k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +90
|-
|10||20k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +100
|-
|11||22k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +110
|-
|12||24k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +120
|-
|13||26k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +130
|-
|14||28k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +140
|-
|15||30k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +150
|-
|16||32k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +160
|-
|17||34k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +170
|-
|18||36k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +180
|-
|19||38k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +190
|-
|20||40k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +200
|-
|21||42k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +210
|-
|22||44k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +220
|-
|23||46k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +230
|-
|24||48k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +240
|-
|25||50k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +250
|-
|26||55k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +260
|-
|27||60k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +270
|-
|28||65k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +280
|-
|29||70k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +290
|-
|30||75k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Troop HP +300
|}

== Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Advisor Zhuge specializes in '''Mecha Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Mecha is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

== Minion - Wood Golem ==
Advisor Zhuge studied the works of the great engineer Lu Ban for years and bought Wetubers' models for reference. This is the fruit of his study!

===Special Ability - Puppet===
Per 10 Wood Golems in battle, Take injury for other Minions by +11% (multiplied by minion level)<br>Recovery SPD -2% (multiplied by minion level)

=== Minion Relics ===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Wood Golems!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!вҳ…вҳҶвҳҶвҳҶвҳҶвҳҶ
!вҳ…вҳ…вҳҶвҳҶвҳҶвҳҶ
!вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳҶвҳҶвҳҶ
!вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳҶвҳҶ
!вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳҶ
!вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Chronometer}}<br>{{Relink|Chronometer}}
|Wood Golem HP +1%
|Wood Golem DEF +1%
|Wood Golem ATK +1%
|Wood Golem RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Janssen Microscope}}<br>{{Relink|Janssen Microscope}}
|Wood Golem HP +1%
|Wood Golem DEF +1%
|Wood Golem ATK +1%
|Wood Golem RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|ENAC Prototype}}<br>{{Relink|ENAC Prototype}}
|Wood Golem HP +2%
|Wood Golem DEF +2%
|Wood Golem ATK +2%
|Wood Golem RUSH +2%
|Wood Golem All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Polonium}}<br>{{Relink|Polonium}}
|Wood Golem HP +2%
|Wood Golem DEF +2%
|Wood Golem ATK +2%
|Wood Golem RUSH +2%
|Wood Golem All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Hubble Telescope}}<br>{{Relink|Hubble Telescope}}
|Wood Golem HP +4%
|Wood Golem HP +4%
|Wood Golem HP +4%
|Wood Golem HP +4%
|Wood Golem HP +4%
|Wood Golem HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Deep Navy Computer}}<br>{{Relink|Deep Navy Computer}}
|Wood Golem DEF +4%
|Wood Golem DEF +4%
|Wood Golem DEF +4%
|Wood Golem DEF +4%
|Wood Golem DEF +4%
|Wood Golem DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Double Helix DNA}}<br>{{Relink|Double Helix DNA}}
|Wood Golem ATK +4%
|Wood Golem ATK +4%
|Wood Golem ATK +4%
|Wood Golem ATK +4%
|Wood Golem ATK +4%
|Wood Golem ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Matrix System}}<br>{{Relink|Matrix System}}
|Wood Golem RUSH +4%
|Wood Golem RUSH +4%
|Wood Golem RUSH +4%
|Wood Golem RUSH +4%
|Wood Golem RUSH +4%
|Wood Golem RUSH +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Output Boost]]
[[Category:Minion HP Boost]]
